description.unified: Deals Physical Damage 12 times to a random enemy.
Summons 5 homing arrows that track enemies. On attack, consumes 1 arrow to deal additional Physical Damage.

Deals Physical Damage to enemies in a line based on their remaining HP and knocks them down. This skill [(added) has an additional 500 Physical Defense Penetration], and if the target is a boss, deals an additional Physical Damage that ignores DEF.

After using a skill or Normal Attack, increases Attack by [???->24(1+0.3Skill Level)] and Critical Hit Chance by 100 for [10 sec->5 sec]. [Moonlight Arrow] stacks up to [3 times->6 times]. [(added) At maximum stacks, you cannot gain additional [Moonlight Arrow] during the duration, but Normal Attacks fire 3 extra arrows that each deal 143% of Attack Power as Physical Damage.]

dark.unified: Has a 50% chance to stun enemies hit for [1 sec->0.6 sec].

light.unified: Summons 2 additional arrows, [(removed) Ignores DEF when there is only 1 enemy].
Damage dealt is increased by [(added) 40%], [(removed) Reduces Mana Cost by 1].
Attack Speed is increased by [(added) 8% per stack], [(removed) Max stack number is changed to 5].

dark.unified: At the start of battle, Attack is increased by [(added) 10%]. This Attack increase stacks up to 10 times, and at 10 stacks, damage dealt to bosses is increased by 20%. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: [Moonlight Flash] Increases DMG by {0}%, and P.DMG the target takes by 20% for 10 sec.
[Moonlight Arrow] increases [(added) normal attack DMG by 50%] and DMG to Non-Hero enemies by {0}% per stack. [(removed) Increases ATK Spd by 100].

On critical hit, Attack Speed is increased by [{0}->{0}%] for 10 sec, and during the duration, Normal Attacks fire an additional arrow that deals {1}% extra Physical Damage to the target. [(added) The additional damage can only occur once every 0.5 sec.]
